test.create_query: CREATE TABLE large ( a Int32, b Int32, c Int32, d Int32, s1 String, s2 String, s3 String )
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO small SELECT number FROM numbers(10000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO large SELECT randUniform(1000, 11000), randUniform(10000, 99999), randUniform(10000, 99999), randUniform(10000, 99999), toString(randUniform(10000, 99999)), toString(randUniform(10000, 99999)), toString(randUniform(10000, 99999)) FROM numbers(100000000) ORDER BY rand()
test.query: SELECT * FROM large l JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_join_lazy_indexing = 0, join_algorithm = 'hash';
SELECT * FROM large l JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_join_lazy_indexing = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash';
SELECT * FROM large l JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_join_lazy_indexing = 0, join_algorithm = 'parallel_hash';
SELECT * FROM large l JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_join_lazy_indexing = 1, join_algorithm = 'parallel_hash';
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO small SELECT number + 100000 FROM numbers(10) ORDER BY rand()
test.query: SELECT * FROM large l JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_join_lazy_indexing = 0, join_algorithm = 'hash';
SELECT * FROM large l JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_join_lazy_indexing = 1, join_algorithm = 'hash';
SELECT * FROM large l JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_join_lazy_indexing = 0, join_algorithm = 'parallel_hash';
SELECT * FROM large l JOIN small s ON l.a = s.a LIMIT 80000000, 10 SETTINGS query_plan_optimize_join_lazy_indexing = 1, join_algorithm = 'parallel_hash';
